characters.name: Adam Burns
characters.description: Adam BurnsGenderMaleBirth date1969 (age 56)OccupationBusinessmanFamily membersAndrea "Andi" Burns(Wife)Don Burns(Brother)Kate "Katie" Burns(Oldest Daughter)Theodore "Teddy" Burns(Son)Emme Burns(Youngest Daughter)Marcy Burns(Sister-In-Law)Joseph "Joe" Burns(Father)Beverly Burns(Mother)Mikey Burns (nephew)Parker Burns (great-nephew)Kelly(Sister-in Law)InformationSeason(s)1, 2, 3, 4First seenPilotLast seenHappy Ann-RV-saryEpisode count69Portrayed byMatt LeBlanc Adam Burns(born in 1969), is a fictional character on the CBS sitcomMan with a Plan. He was played byMatt LeBlanc. Adam comes from an Italian-American family of his brotherDon, of which he is the only one. He is from, and presumably born in New Jersey. Adam is generally good-natured and well-meaning, but not-so-bright. He loves food, family, friends, jam, and gardening. Adam is a stereotypical man who worked with his brother at the Burns Brother Construction businessman, under-educated, and constantly looking for work.

characters.name: Andi Burns
characters.description: Andi BurnsNameAndrea BurnsGenderFemaleBirth date1969 (age 56)Family membersAdam Burns(Husband)Kate "Katie" Burns(Oldest Daughter)Theodore "Teddy" Burns(Son)Emme Burns(Youngest Daughter)Marcy Burns(sister-in-law)Don Burns(brother-in-law)Mikey Burns (nephew)Parker Burns (Great-nephew)Joseph "Joe" Burns(father-In-Law)Beverly Burns(mother-in-law)Kelly (younger sister)Frank (father)Alice (mother)InformationSeason(s)1, 2, 3, 4First seenPilotLast seenHappy Ann-RV-saryEpisode count69Portrayed byLiza Snyder Andrea "Andi" Burns(born in 1969) is a character from the American television sitcomMan with a Plan(2016–present), played byLiza Snyder. Went to a high school near Adam, Marcy, and Don's school and was well known for wearing a leather suit to a football game that made fart noises on the bleachers and was given a mean nickname from the head cheerleader, who turned out to be Marcy. Used to play badminton. Had a competitive relationship with her sister, Kelly, who she often felt inferior to.

characters.description: Emme BurnsNameEmma BurnsAlso known asButterbean (Nickname by Adam)GenderFemaleBirth date2011(age 14)OccupationstudentFamily membersAdam Burns(Father)Andrea "Andi" Burns(Mother)Kate "Katie" Burns(Older Sister)Theodore "Teddy" Burns(Older Brother)Don Burns(uncle)Marcy Burns(Aunt)Joe Burns(paternal grandfather)Beverly Burns(paternal grandmother)Mikey Burns (cousin)Parker Burns (2nd cousin)Kelly(Aunt)InformationSeason(s)1, 2, 3, 4First seenPilotPortrayed byHala Finley Emma "Emme" Burnsis the youngest daughter of the Burns family who is also a student in Pittsburgh. She is played byHala Finley. The youngest child in the Burns family, who is five years old at the start of the series. Emme is the younger, innocent child, who often knows her parents will never let her get away with a lot. She is 7 years old as of Season 3.
